businessTypes.label: SaaS / Product

hero.title: Launch your next SaaS in minutes
hero.subtitle: Drop in your brand and let PressPilot assemble a production-ready marketing site.

businessTypes.featuresHeading: Everything you need to ship faster

features.label: Fast builds
features.description: Generate complete landing pages and patterns in minutes, not weeks.

features.label: Flexible styles
features.description: Swap between curated palettes and typography without touching code.

features.label: Multilingual-ready
features.description: Serve global audiences with RTL-aware content and layouts.

features.label: Production ready
features.description: Clean block markup, solid theme tokens, and exportable static builds.

contact.headline: Ready to launch?
contact.body: Tell us about your product and we’ll help you ship a polished marketing site.

hero.title: Book more local clients
hero.subtitle: Give your neighborhood business a trustworthy site with clear services and calls to action.

features.label: Local-first layout
features.description: Show service areas, hours, and Google-friendly copy blocks.

features.label: Booking friendly
features.description: Highlight phone, booking links, or walk-in details with dedicated CTAs.

features.label: Service menus
features.description: Prebuilt patterns for pricing tables, testimonials, and FAQs.

features.label: Trust-building sections
features.description: Drop in reviews, certifications, and community highlights.

contact.headline: Need a local partner?
contact.body: Share a bit about your services and the neighborhoods you cover. We’ll tailor the kit around it.

hero.title: Serve memorable meals every night
hero.subtitle: Showcase your menu, dining room, and online ordering in one polished site.

features.label: Menu storytelling
features.description: Highlight signature dishes, chef notes, and seasonal specials.

features.label: Reservation ready
features.description: Clear CTAs for booking, phone orders, and walk-ins.

features.label: Delivery & pickup
features.description: Promote delivery partners, takeout links, and order hours.

features.label: Location friendly
features.description: Map, hours, and neighborhood callouts keep guests oriented.

contact.headline: Hungry for {{brand}}?
contact.body: Tell us your party size or catering needs and we’ll confirm quickly.

hero.title: Ship a conversion-ready storefront
hero.subtitle: Give your product line a premium home with Woo-ready patterns and strong CTAs.

features.label: Product storytelling
features.description: Hero, feature, and testimonial blocks geared for merch drops and launches.

features.label: Payment-ready sections
features.description: Highlight offers, bundles, and flexible pricing with purpose-built cards.

features.label: Catalog friendly
features.description: Grid layouts optimized for MOQ, bundle, or SKU callouts.

features.label: Marketing ready
features.description: Sections for promos, reviews, and newsletter capture built-in.

contact.headline: Scale your storefront
contact.body: Tell us about your products and fulfillment flow. We’ll tune the kit for your offer.

hero.title: Give your studio a bold presence
hero.subtitle: Dark mode visuals and editorial typography for agencies, creators, and consultants.

features.label: Premium aesthetic
features.description: High-contrast sections built for dramatic imagery and typography.

features.label: Strategy sections
features.description: Show process, services, and expertise with flexible blocks.

features.label: Case study ready
features.description: Modular layouts for showcasing wins, metrics, and testimonials.

features.label: Quick handoff
features.description: All copy hooks and CTAs wired for high-end consultative work.

contact.headline: Start a project
contact.body: Tell us about your client roster or the next campaign. We’ll prep a polished starter kit.
